samples.text: All fish are animals. A salmon is a fish. Therefore, is a salmon an animal?
Every fish belongs to the category of animals. A salmon is classified as a fish. Does this mean a salmon is an animal?
All aquatic vertebrates are animals. An Atlantic salmon is an aquatic vertebrate. Therefore, is an Atlantic salmon an animal?
A salmon belongs to the group of fish. The group of fish falls under animals. Based on this, is a salmon an animal?
All fish are animals. A salmon is a fish. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is a salmon an animal?
